text.message: idk what to do,   feels like no matter what, i'm just giving white a great start
so now you dont have ore or wheat gj blue
white has the only good placements
u arent entitled to a spot
no matter what i do, white is cooking
but you choose your spot bad
Why do I have the only good placements
no need for us to fight
we need to work together to fight white
Why are we collectively focusing white here lol
You Guys have plenty good positions to be just as competitive
you just made me waste a road...   and played very emotional on the placements
Dudes, what is this let’s gang up on me strategie xD
i didnt make you do anything
no, i didn't ask what you preferred
i asked which you were going for
and i told you what i prefer
what does that have to do with trust
we both have to do it different sides anyway
you knew exactly what i meant
you chose to waste the road
you were trying to plow me
and you could have agreed not to compete for it
so dont get all high and mighty
if you could have plowed me for 2 roads you would have
ok,  mute time for you,  hope your day gets better
Guys, you can’t plow me what are you talking about. I can always settle one way or another
Blue, you seem like a reasonable individual, do you make sense of this chat?
you imean the one who started the game by choosing bad spots just to plow someone
Seems to me you are obviously going to win with the sheep port btw
Look at his position, hé had outs to either the ore, or wheat. So he would get 4 resources for sure, plus the sheep port with all the sheep.
I’m using my time to talk
we don't care what you are chatting about
I use my time for whatever purpose I want
ive muted and reported you for stalling btw white
You are just a very stupid man
My man red is the most toxic player I have player with so far, it’s impressive
Blue what you need to extend
I’m not king making. I’m making sure you can’t take road
Red, I’m on 1700 dating with 20/20 karma. I never leave a game, im never toxic like you are. You can report me all you want, it means nothing
intentionally not taking army to let blue win smh
I have 2 VP and a rb
You are literally just trying to creatie a villain
You must have it rough in life
